data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. ME ME has been contesting far stronger races, finishing midfield, but not far off the winner in the Provincial Mid Champs over 1400m at Kembla Grange last time out. She is beautifully placed here with the claim, and with the winkers on for the first time, she will be hard to hold out. 6. THE NEW SINATRA finally cops a decent gate and is expected to go close today. He was snagged back from the outside alley last time and got home late when sixth over 1100m here nearly 3 weeks ago. He can settle a couple of pairs closer this time, and is another with each-way claims. 4. AUTUMN BLONDE is an improving filly who looks to have strengthened since her spell, resuming with a fast finishing fourth over 1100m at this track. Tommy Berry sticks with her, and so do we. 1. CONVERGENT had a very tough run after missing the kick fresh up here 4 weeks ago, but still finished a game third. He slides down in class and should be very competitive in this, especially if the track is wet. Each way.","runners":[7,6,4,1],"exclusive":true}
